[h1]Honestly, I’m embarrassed that I even bought this game.[/h1]
It’s been months since release, yet the developers still haven’t fixed a critical bug that makes you completely lose the ability to interact with the ball. This isn’t a minor glitch — it breaks the entire core of the gameplay.

And then there’s the total absence of a report system. Something so obvious that it shouldn’t even need to be discussed. I’m not going to claim the game has drowned in players who intentionally ruin matches and do whatever they can to make the experience miserable for others… but, well, you get the idea.

The whole thing feels like the devs took the money and left the project in the hands of two and a half programmers equipped with a bag of rice and a pat on the back. Otherwise, it’s hard to explain such a waste of potential.

I’m exhausted. Tired of smashing my head against the table every time a new griefer lands on my team or yet another bug ruins the game at the worst possible moment. Tired of the glitches, the toxicity, and the feeling that the developers simply aren’t trying to fix anything.

I don’t want to play this anymore — and yes, the community played a huge role in that, but it’s not just the players’ fault. The developers could’ve done so much more. But they didn’t.

---
[h1]Мне правда стыдно, что я вообще купил эту игру.[/h1]
Прошли месяцы после релиза, а разработчики до сих пор не исправили критический баг, из-за которого можно полностью потерять возможность взаимодействовать с мячом. Это не мелочь — это ломает саму основу геймплея.

Отдельная боль — отсутствие системы репортов. Казалось бы, настолько очевидная вещь, что даже обсуждать странно. И да, я не буду утверждать, что из-за этого игра превратилась в болото людей, которые намеренно руинят матчи и делают всё, чтобы испортить опыт другим… но, ну, вы меня поняли.

Честно, складывается ощущение, будто разработчики взяли деньги, а потом поручили поддерживать проект двум с половиной программистам, выдав им пачку риса на месяц. Иначе вот это бессмысленное расталкивание собственных амбиций объяснить трудно.

Я устал. Устал биться головой об стол, когда в команде попадается очередной руинер или игра ломается в самый неподходящий момент. Устал от багов, от токсичности, от ощущения, что разработчики просто не пытаются что-то исправить.

Я больше не хочу в это играть — и да, комьюнити сыграло в этом огромную роль, но вина лежит не только на игроках. Разработчики могли бы сделать гораздо больше. Но не сделали.

Итак минусы:
-хреновый подбор. когда может закидывать ранги с очень большим разбросом (об этом писали сами разработчики)
-хреновый неткод. когда у тебя выбивают мяч уже после паса, или мяч выпадывает из рук вратаря в ворота и засчитывает гол (не поверите, об этом тоже разработчики сами писали)
-отсутствие нормальной связи. вот тут вообще не понятно почему нельзя было сделать пуш ту толк, или хотя бы колесо голосовых сигналов. (да возможно хотели уменьшить варианты токсичности игроков, поэтому нет чата, нет возможности связи в лоби или между командами. но поверьте "отлично" вы будете слышать только когда кто-то облажается. в итоге токсичности в игре стало намного больше, чем должно было быть изначально)
-отсутствие наказаний за афк и ливы, но и сюдаже сразу докину периодические вылеты.
-отсутствие каких-либо значительных фиксов или обновлений (не считая периодических добавлений разных скинчиков и прочего мусора)

Плюсы:
-весело. забить гол с лету или сделав сальто через себя - непередаваемое чувство.

游戏是好玩的，但是这个死吗服务器能在你晋级赛进球领先剩一分钟的时候直接让你回到主菜单看离线模式四个大字，重进回来给你战绩打个叉叉。草饲尼玛 还有这个游戏的挂狗凌波微步这一块给我和队友都直接看笑了。
除此之外这个游戏在开了加速器的情况下依然经常出现丢包问题，并且这个游戏的游玩体验会由于网络问题受到巨大影响，比如网卡的时候会出现下列几种情况（都是本人游玩时出现过的）：1.吸不到球，球明明就在脚下却没办法进行人球结合的情况，只能强行用空格，鼠标点击，伸腿铲断等其他方式才能让球移动。2.明明拿到球了也人球结合了，但是玩家视角中球却在原地，而事实是球已经在玩家脚下盘带，玩家自己却看不见球在自己脚下，相当于自己只能凭感觉带球，并且这种情况下传球轨迹还会有问题。3.网络卡顿情况下担任门将有时候会出现自己视角里把球扑到了但是球还是进了的这样的脱手问题，回放里的样子就是这个球直接穿过你然后进门。4.抢点时有时会出现明明站位比对手好鼠标快按烂都抢不过别人的情况，在我视角里自己的动作比对手都更早进行都抢不过。 草拟吗这个服务器要一直还是这逼样官方就等着这游戏死吧。

Je le regrette tellement hélas.

J'aurai adoré avoir l'opportunité d'avoir une garde-robe afin de save les tenues personnalisées au lieu de les refaire à chaque fois, créer sa propre équipe avec ses valeurs en autres, un système de ban/signalement des joueurs, plus de presets de visage, plus de coiffures et autres tenues en tout genre [pourquoi pas payants et gratuits car oui ils doivent gratter leur pommes], rendre le gameplay bien plus souple car je trouve les actions beaucoup trop rigides et SURTOUT ajouter d'autres options de caméras.. Nous sommes sur un jeu de football, donc on devrait pouvoir avoir pls vues comme dans RL pour bien visualiser le terrain car la cam ball est pas vraiment usefull. 

Après oui, Rematch est son commencement, dont à avoir à l'avenir.. !

La verdad, el juego es un 10/10. Estoy medio podrido de que siempre me toquen los mismos tres o cuatro, dependiendo si estoy jugando solo o con amigos. ¡Tienen que poner un test de IQ cada vez que hay un nuevo jugador! No puede ser que haya uno más egoísta que el otro, y también los que patean desde afuera del área cargando el tiro, pensando que son Lamine Yamal. Estaría bueno que aparezca el rango de tus compañeros para poder saber qué tan limitados son.

Pero además de eso, las mecánicas y la fluidez que tiene el juego son excelentes. También estaría buenísimo que los que atajan dejen de comerse los goles más boludos. No puede ser que yo tenga a Marchesín o Chiquito Romero, y el rival tenga al prime de Courtois o Neuer. Pero bueno, no tengo más nada que decir: ¡es un juegazo!

Y quiero dejar unas palabras para los pelotudos que me tocan siempre en mi equipo: Rin Itochi — Nico y su amigo — los dos chilenos con muñones... Ojalá me sigan tocando en contra, porque en mi equipo no son bienvenidos. Algún día van a sacar la actualización de reportar, y no voy a dudar ni un segundo en hacerlo.

This game was a huge discovery when I tested both betas, and I loved it.

I was getting hyped for a release for the first time in what seemed ages. And also tried as hard as I could to ignore the gigantic amount flaws and enjoy it while things get patched. In the end it pains me a lot but I can't recommend this game for the product it is now, neither for what it wants to become according to the developers.

The game can be great and a thrill to play if it gets properly fixed, but I'm not sure if a studio should be able to have this game as a full release in such a hot mess with not a single part of it functioning properly (aside from the store with weekly new content -remember this is a paid game with microtransactions-), take a month to release a patch that makes things worse and then pretend the community will still hold.

But even if we wait, the dev's vision has really strange ideas that want to keep in the game, like pairing solo queuers against full stacks and allowing players from every skill level playing together. So yes, you can rank up to be paired with 2 bronzes, 1 silver and one elite against a full stack on comms. If you want to have a chance, you better have some friends mate.

P.D.: If you are a mkb user, god be with you friend. The controls are something to behold. But don't be shy and try them yourself. Don't want to spoil the fun.

REMATCH is a game that can be both thrilling and frustrating, depending on the team you end up with. One of the biggest issues is that many players simply refuse to pass the ball. Instead of setting up plays, they fire the ball straight down the middle, giving the goalkeeper almost nothing to do.

Passes, when they do happen, are often low-quality and mistimed, leading to constant turnovers. Goalkeepers, in particular, can be a double-edged sword. Far too often, they launch the ball with maximum power directly toward the enemy goal, only for the opposing keeper to casually catch it. This reckless play often forces your team into defense immediately after, trying to fix someone else’s mistake.

Frequent misplays like these can turn a potentially exciting match into a cycle of frustration, where you spend more time cleaning up after your team than actually playing strategically. REMATCH has its moments of glory, but until teamwork improves, expect plenty of chaotic, nerve-racking matches

The core gameplay is fun, sure, but the whole thing feels like it needed another twelve months in the oven. The netcode is a joke, with players teleporting and the ball randomly changing its mind mid-flight. Goalkeepers sometimes catch the ball and still concede, because why not. Ranked matchmaking is complete nonsense, throwing silvers, diamonds and masters into the same game like it’s a social experiment. Solo players regularly get matched against full coordinated squads, which is about as fun as it sounds.

Bugs and exploits pop up faster than the developers can patch them. Defense is basically a suggestion since the ball will casually ignore physics and phase through you anyway. There’s a good game buried in here. It’s just working very hard not to be found.

Долго ждал эту игру. Не успел попасть на бэту, поэтому не выдержал и купил pro версию, чтобы поиграть заранее. Меня зацепила новое видение футбола (игра за одного игрока), которое не могли реализовать очень долго (инди игры не считаем, играли), но реализация подкачала.
1) Баги, неткод, серваки
Их очень много и они постоянно у тебя появляются. То ты бежишь с мячом, а он, внезапно, уже давно остался сзади. То ты сейвишь, а мяч будто бы "выскальзывает" из рук и гол засчитывается, то мяч просто не видно, когда он у тебя в ногах, из-за чего играть невыносимо, то ты слышишь звук отбора, а мяч остается у соперника, то мяч уже залетел в ворота, а потом он внезапно в руках вратаря, или, мое любимое, когда мяч у соперника, проходит секунда, а мяч уже у тебя в руках,  потому что ты его засейвил (мяч просто телепортнулся у тебя на экране, и тебе повезло, что ты стоял в позе защиты) Баги пытаются решать, но, будто бы, появляются все новые и новые.
2) Вылеты
О да, кто только о них не говорил. Вылеты это твоя база. Очень круто, когда вылетает прям в самом начале, когда ты только нашел рейтинговый матч, а после перезахода игра просто не хочет играться, ты не можешь никак взаимодействовать и адекватно играть. В итоге ты пытаешься перезайти еще раз, а уже низя:(
3) Рейтинг.
Такого ужасного рейтинга даже в кс нет. Я в соло умудрился поднятся до Элиты(уже ниже), но даже там тебе спокойно в команду кидают сильверов и даже бронзу, и ты ничего с этим сделать не можешь. Также нет никаких инструментов даже просто сообщить о токсичном игроке. Ты можешь тащить на воротах как бог, но один токсик заруинит игру, когда при счете 2:2 либо выйдет из игры, либо будет пытаться тебе забить. После такого играть не хочется.
4) Геймплей и контент.
Нет каких-либо интересных штук. У тебя по факту есть только рейтинг и быстрые матчи. Батл пас просто помойка, потому что кроме как кружочков с циферками и наградками там ничего нет. Ты просто фармишь фишки в матчах и потом обмениваешь их на новые носки). Мои ожидания - мои проблемы, но после пролога я ждал хоть небольшое развитие сюжета, какие-либо ежедневные задания, интересные активности, потому что игра это позволяет, но разрабам лишь бы выпустить новый набор "морское дно 2". Я понимаю, что за разные части игры отвечают разные отделы, но когда, вместо долгожданного фикса, ты получаешь новые никому не нужный набор, ты по другому начинаешь смотреть на разрабов.
Из улучшений игры я бы отметил лишь визуальные аспекты
- Много новых классных карт, 
- Более плавные анимации,

Probably on of the better arcade soccer games out there as of writing this. Easy to learn with a high skill ceiling that only goes higher the more you communicate. As with any team-oriented competitive game there may be some frustrations with how some people play the game, but as long as you communicate and are willing to fill in where others lack even while playing alone, it can make everyone's experience even better. After Patch #1 this game has felt a little better and look forward to what the future may hold. However, the game is still pretty buggy with the ball interactions and doesn't really feel like the ranked system is complete if that is something that interests you. Constantly feels as if it flip flops on how good your team is and the opposing team is all the time, so you get stuck in a limbo at times. As amazing as the game can be at times, I'd recommend waiting for a sale or when the game notably improves in its matchmaking, net-code and bugs are smoothed over.

To start, the idea of this game is really cool. However there are way to many problems for me.

First, I don't typically play competitive games, if you have to develop and maintain skills just to be good enough to have fun with the game it's not worth the time to me. I enjoy playing soccer and was hoping this would be a fun game even if I just played casually but this seems to be more about being a competitive game than about soccer.

It can get pretty janky at times, especially around the goalkeeper. weird things happen frequently enough that it can get frustrating.

The controls are terrible. they are just super unintuitive if you have played any soccer games before.

The matchmaking is terrible.getting started we spent most of our time playing against people who had clearly been playing a ton. 

There are a lot of mechanics that the game encourage ridiculous individual skills and discourage team play, which some people may like but its super frustrating to me.

Some of the "skills" are just dumb in my opinion. like people chipping it up to themselves and doing a bicycle and scoring or just doing rainbows all the way down the field, or a team that we played that their only play was to have the keep send it to the other goal and their player bicycles it in every shot. The game seems to give preference to shots over all else.

Also, after the goal keeper picks up the ball they need to protect him a little, like not allow an opponent within 3 feet or something. Sometimes opponents will stick on the goal keeper like glue after they pick it up and there is a really chance when they're doing that that they can score just by chance. 

I haven't interacted with the community much but it does seem kind of crappy. When people have critiques I see a lot of " your just not good at it" type comments which I don't think are helpful. I want to have fun with a game, even if I'm not very good. Also, the one time we did get on a winning streak everyone started quitting or just doing dumb stuff to their team before the end of the match. So it seems like people who are winning don't give any space for new people to learn, and when they lose they just quit. Not very cool.

There is no splitscreen so you can't sit down with friends and play, everyone has to have their own machine and copy of the game. This seems like a game that should have split screen.

Overall this is a game that I really want to like, but I kind of hate it.

Update: After getting some more hours it can be fun sometimes but is still very frustrating often times. however the most frustrating thing for me now is that the game will often not allow me to join matches with my friends. I just tried for 40 minutes to play with some friends and it didn't let me into a single match. and this has happened multiple times! What a waste of time!

Update: The servers still suck but now they have added a leaver penalty so after the game kicks you which it does all the time, you now can't join a new game for several minutes.

Rematch es un juego que me gusta —soy fan de este tipo de propuestas arcade en tercera persona, con ritmo rápido, controles accesibles y jugadas exageradas que te hacen reír o frustrarte en segundos. La idea está buena, y cuando funciona, se siente realmente divertido.

Dicho eso, todavía le falta mucho por mejorar, especialmente en lo técnico. El mayor problema está en la conexión y respuesta del juego: hay ocasiones en las que el balón no se registra correctamente, el jugador salta hacia donde no debería o falla un pase sin razón aparente, incluso si tu intención era clara. A veces sientes que no estás del todo en control, y eso en un juego competitivo puede ser muy frustrante.

Los servidores también necesitan trabajo. Hay pequeñas desconexiones o delays que arruinan jugadas importantes, y aunque el concepto del juego es bueno, estos detalles técnicos afectan directamente la experiencia.

En cuanto al gameplay, hay técnicas algo rotas (como ciertos regates o movimientos que "teletransportan" el balón), lo que hace que algunos jugadores abusen del sistema en lugar de jugar en equipo. También se nota que el sistema de posicionamiento no está bien incentivado, porque la mayoría quiere hacer todo solo —y terminas defendiendo solo más de lo que deberías.

En resumen: Rematch tiene una base divertida, especialmente si te gustan los juegos de fútbol arcade y lo juegas con amigos. Pero necesita pulirse mucho más a nivel técnico y de balance. Si los desarrolladores lo siguen trabajando, puede llegar a ser un muy buen título. Por ahora, es entretenido… pero imperfecto.

This game needed another 6 months to a year in development. The core game has the potential to be a really fun enjoyable arcade football game but at this moment in time it's a buggy, broken mess with so many QOL features missing it's laughable. 
Each game is a coin flip whether you'll get a decent connection or not and avoid all the teleporting, ball disappearing, Goalkeepers catching the ball or making the save but a goal be given. Broken "mechanics" that are just bugs that are aided but the awful netcode, the priority system which seems inconsistent at best, bugs that prevent you from being able to interact with the ball, which was in the beta. Quality of life stuff, no report system, Not being able to take a party into a custom match you have to disband the party and then re-invite everyone. Once you begin searching for a match you're unable to stop it, it gives you the option to but it just doesn't work.
Fancy doing some training and want to retry to get a better score? Tough, you get kicked back to the main menu to restart it all over. The ranked system is a complete joke, once you reach a rank e.g. platinum you can never rank down from that. You can go between Plat 3,2 and 1 but never go lower. Kinda negates the ranked system. 

For people considering picking this game up who have no friends playing it, don't do it. Solo queuing is a ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ hellscape where wannabe superstars will offer absolutely nothing all game then the moment you don't give them the ball or make a mistake you will get hounded with "Good Job" "Tekkers". 

With friends there is some fun to be had, the core idea of the game is a very good one just all the issues mentioned above truly hold it back. I would seriously suggest, if you're interested put it on your wishlist wait for a big sale, or come back and check in about 6 months to a year if there's been any vast improvements. 

I truly hope the devs fix these issues as there is a very good game there. It's just unfortunately weighed down by a mountain of glitches, bugs and netcode issues.

Update: Since my review, the devs have released a few patches that have actually made the game worse. I really want to root for the game and want it to improve but it's truly desperate how bad it is. AVOID THIS GAME UNTIL IT GETS FIXED

This game has a lot of potential, however it is being held back by a rushed release and a long list of issues caused by the abysmal netcode that can ruin entire matches in one second. I've played 200+ games as goalkeeper and stopped 500+ shots on net, and I can safely confirm that every game is a coin toss between a barely functional match and a busted ghost-ball mess with sliding players to rival most wanted's rubberbanding AI cars. Playing goalkeeper is absolutely miserable not because of the game's mechanics, but because the game's actively playing against you by forcing a turtling mindset since the netcode will NOT prioritize you if you catch the ball during a high pass: the receiving attacker will almost always win the interaction because you grabbed the ball during his shooting animation. Oh and the bug that makes it impossible for you to touch the ball is still prevalent.

Despite the update which was supposed to fix this, the issue is still prevalent and actively ruining defense for everyone while GKs get ♥♥♥♥ on by wannabe ronaldos because the server shat its pants 5 seconds before overtime. FIFU will certainly die if Sloclap doesn't get its ♥♥♥♥ together, which they clearly don't have. Steer clear from ranked until the game's fixed.

[b][i]Note: some (not all) of the bugs mentioned in this review have since been addressed, I took a while writing this.[/i][/b]

[b]REMATCH gives a different angle on the world’s beautiful game, and it creates a [i]mostly[/i] fun competitive sports experience. Yet, it’s Sloclap’s [u]least intriguing game[/u] by a wide margin, most incomplete release, and possibly worst polished to boot. And to be clear, this is not praise of the level of polish in Absolver or Sifu, both of which were buggy and had all kinds of frustrating errors even deep into their life. But at the very least these games felt more finished upon release, and also were just genuinely more innovative and enthralling, even though there are aspects of both of these present.[/b]

The different angle I’m talking about isn’t the angle of a shot rebounding off the backwall and toward a fellow striker, although that [i]is[/i] a very interesting angle available in REMATCH that you can’t get in normal soccer. No, the angle I’m referring to is the way the ball controls at the feet. Having a “push ball” button, and a less magnetic possession than typical for a soccer game makes controlling it feel very interesting. Shooting essentially functions as deeper passing, and although I feel weighting passes properly is too difficult (I often can’t get the perfect weighting when having to decide between tap, hold tap, tap + push button, shoot trigger, shoot hold trigger… etc.), I love the fact this means that skill expression is very deep. Beyond this, there are a variety of techniques which aren’t formally incorporated into the game so to speak (they don’t have a specified input in the menus and they aren’t taught in a tutorial), but which do exist and they let you style up and express yourself (a great example is the “ippy slide”). Sloclap have stated [quote= Sloclap, July 2025]…and Rematch is not just a football game – in a way it’s a samurai game.[/quote] And they are absolutely right. This type of [i]tech[/i] is the secret sauce of a game like [i]Melee[/i], and what makes playing it feel so satisfying.

Unfortunately, there is a semi-common occurring bug where your character will never take possession so to speak, and so it’s impossible to know sometimes whether you just suck or the game is failing you. And the bugs go way beyond this.

There are bugs with animations, the goal replay is headache inducing, and alt+tabbing causes a tearing effect near the top of the screen. Control options will display on your screen for seemingly no reason, (showing control options for things that don’t even exist in the game, mind you!) which is ironic, because there currently exists no way to remap your controls in-game (note: this now exists in limited form). It would’ve been unthinkable to me that this was even possible prior to release by the way.

There’s no way to report teammates who purposefully score own-goals. There’s no way to “avoid” teammates who are consistently creating a negative play experience, and there’s no multi-queue option, which stinks for quickmatch play already being separated into 3 forms.

These are all annoying things but what I find the most frustrating is the very nature of the game’s construction. I’ve said this before in other reviews, and I also specifically outlined my concerns in the Steam Discussions [url=https://steamcommunity.com/app/2138720/discussions/0/604146344638094345/]here[/url], but in short, team-based competitive sports games need to incentivize passing (or team play more generally) not only by its contribution to winning, but by directly providing benefits to the altruistic player. Unfortunately, in the quite sluggish post-launch response by the devs, little has been mentioned about this, even though it would benefit the game greatly.

Even after dropping 60+ hours, reaching Masters rank, and finishing all the achievements (the last one is bugged, I have completed a “post to post” assist countless times), I’m still enjoying this game… but I am left with the feeling that not only is REMATCH missing something in its core, but it is a game which shouldn’t have been released yet! 

The season pass having phases that unlock large amounts of time apart, the poor customization options (I think the level of granularity is good, but the options themselves are a bit… ugly. (I think evidence of this is when more players do their best to make ugly ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ characters instead of cool ones, which they do.)), and the arbitrary color restrictions (when team colors are local) are very weird.

Unfortunately, this is a very tentative recommend from me, even though I’d love to recommend this glowingly. I anticipate getting back around to Sifu (never finished) and Absolver (never 100%’d, and I’d like to) some day to discuss my thoughts further.

[b]7/10[/b]

Do ponto de vista da jogabilidade, o título apresenta uma experiência apenas mediana. Trata-se de um jogo que favorece jogadores com menor habilidade técnica, permitindo que estes se destaquem com relativa facilidade ao abraçar todas as mecânicas disponíveis. É particularmente indicado para aqueles que costumam ser amplamente superados por amigos em jogos como FIFA, ou para quem jamais teve contato com um ambiente competitivo no universo dos games.

Quanto à interação por voz, recomenda-se fortemente desativar o sistema de comunicação via voip logo ao iniciar. A experiência auditiva tende a ser prejudicada por ofensas gratuitas – seja de jogadores argentinos te chamando de macaco ou de crianças proferindo comentários imaturos e inoportunos.

Ainda assim, o jogo revela seu potencial de entretenimento quando desfrutado em grupo. Fechar um lobby com três ou mais amigos e aventurar-se no modo ranqueado pode proporcionar momentos genuinamente divertidos.

Contudo, é importante destacar a presença de inúmeros bugs, frequentemente explorados por jogadores sem qualquer pudor, o que compromete a integridade da competição e ressalta a necessidade de maior rigor técnico por parte dos desenvolvedores.

El juego está bueno, si. Querés comprarlo ? seguí de largo papá. Esperá una oferta o que te lo regalen, no vale lo que sale. 

Es novedoso y entretenido, aún más divertido cuando jugás con amigos.
Es recomendable ? No. Al menos no si tenés que pagarlo. Está, por momentos, saturado de bugs que lo hacen injugable y frustrante.

Tiene una curva de dificultad buena. Una vez que dominas los controles; los pases; los movimientos de arquero; el regate; los tiros con efecto; el juegos se vuelve muy satisfactorio. Pero muchas veces de nada sirve tener el control total si tantos bugs y crasheos te arruinan la experiencia. No estamos hablando de un acceso anticipado, es un juego "completo" que se lanzó al mercado saliendo $15 y prometiendo una nueva experiencia futbolística (cosa que cumple, pero acompañado de la falta de contenido, de un buen Matchmaking y de competitivo en distintas categorías -sumado a los bugs- termina siendo una experiencia mediocre).

No considero malos a los servidores ya que NO tuve, prácticamente, errores de conexión ni sufrí (mucho) a causa del lag como otros jugadores han padecido. Mis amigos tampoco y no tenemos ninguno el Internet de Musk. Por lo que no puedo quejarme de eso, aunque si entiendo que muchos se quejen.

El competitivo: hasta ahora solo hay UNA categoría, 5v5. No quiero comparar con el Rocket League pero me es imposible. Tenés los modos 3v3 y 4v4 también, tanto costaba abrir competitivo en esas categorías ??? Los desarrolladores NUNCA tuvieron que organizar un futbol 5 y se nota. Lo difícil que es encontrar el tiempo para que 5 personas se organicen a jugar a esto es completamente estúpido. Pero supongamos que eso es un problema menor ya que el juego está muy vivo. No vas a pasar más de 2 minutos esperando para un partido, lo que me lleva al siguiente punto:
¿No tenés 4 amigos, igual de salames que vos, que compraron el juego? Bueno, jodete. Te vas a tener que fumar a 4 perejiles que no pasen la pelota nunca y que CON SUERTE no la pierdan. Podés hacer 20.000 puntos entre pases, paradas, intercepciones y goles por partido pero el juego siempre te va a emparejar con gente que se cree Palermo en Boca.
Y ni hablar de los "Bien Hecho!" de tu compañero que se quedó en el área rival esperando que se la pases mientras vos defendes SOLO el arco y terminan metiéndote gol. Esa es la mejor parte.

Hackers no me crucé ni uno en mis casi 100 horas jugadas, ni siquiera en la beta. Si te pintaron el juego con qué tiene cheaters te están mintiendo. Obvio debe haber más de uno, pero tenes que tener muy mala suerte para cruzártelos.

Me encantaría hablar de las mecánicas del juego, de los gráficos o de las animaciones pero todo queda opacado cuando los bugs interrumpen la experiencia en la mayoría de partidos. Un ejemplo menor: desde la beta que las repeticiones son impredecibles, nunca sabes qué bug nuevo aparecerá. O sino, otro bug que está desde la beta, no podés cancelar el matchmaking una vez iniciado, aunque lo canceles va a seguir buscando un partido.

No es un mal juego, repito, menos si se juega con amigos. Pero le falta mucho recorrido. Si estás acostumbrado al Rocket League y pasas a esto pensando que será mejor, ya te digo que no te mandés. Faltan muchas actualizaciones para que sea realmente recomendable y que de verdad sea un juego "completo".

Increible juego, ojala algun dia (aunque no creo) creen el modo 11vs11, seria genial y poder hacer campeonatos por paises, regiones o cosas asi, pero basicamente este juego es super divertido y puede llegar a su prime
Ya jugué muchas más horas, y espero que no lo compren, van a perder plata y tiempo al pedo. Todo bugueado, anda mal y animaciones verga
Esta muy bueno te sentís que sos un jugador de los super campeones
